SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2009 BY PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY DEFENDANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, FRED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SF BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT * PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW: 1.) THAT DEFENDANT'S PROPERTY WAS IN A DANGEROUS CONDITION 2.) THAT DEFENDANT CREATED OR HAD CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE OF ANY DANGEROUS CONDITIONS, OR THAT IF SUCH CONDITIONS EXISTED ALSO IT WAS THE PROXIMATE CAUSE OF THE ACCIDENT, AND WAS NOT THE PLAINTIFF'S OWN NEGLIGENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
